title: eval_size_test: u64 as usize silently truncates on 32-bit
description: evaluator.rs:572: `let limit = l as usize` — on 32-bit targets a u64 value > 2^32 (e.g. `size :over 5G` = 5368709120) truncates silently to 1073741824 (1G), making the comparison wrong. Use `usize::try_from(l).unwrap_or(usize::MAX)` so the semantics are correct on all targets.
